body:

| | | | Peter -- Marco is ready. Not only is he confident and prepared -- most important, he's excited. He's looking forward to introducing himself and our campaign to even more Americans tonight. He knows the American people are ready for a forward-looking leader to build a New American Century. Since the last debate, our campaign has surged with momentum. From donors to volunteers to crowds to media attention (and yes, even polls) ... by every conceivable measure, Marco has risen. That makes Marco's plan tonight pretty straightforward: do exactly what he did in the first two debates.
* He's going to tell his family's story and explain why he's running to ensure the same American Dream is alive and well for future generations, just like it was for him.
* He's going to show the American people -- better than anyone else on that stage can -- why a future built on common sense, conservative solutions will live up to the promise of our past.
* He's going to articulate clearly his ideas for the 21st Century -- the New American Century.

You're not going to want to miss this. Watch live tonight on CNBC (DVR the World Series, this is the real must-see TV). Sincerely, Terry SullivanCampaign ManagerMarco Rubio for President P.S. We don't know exactly what questions Marco will be asked during tonight's debate (you'll have to tune in to find out), but we asked him 15 questions that definitely won't be asked for our latest video. **[Click here to see what we asked -- and how Marco answered.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44627639:6WwN_GLNl:m:1:1349778030:9F0E36BB7DD77E3207A66D80E2C53FD7:r)**

Fellow Conservative --

Last night I announced my plan to FILIBUSTER the phony debt ceiling "deal" between President Obama and outgoing House Speaker John Boehner.

When I take the stage in Boulder, Colorado tonight for the Republican Presidential debate, I plan to rip this "deal" and the rest of the Washington Machine to shreds.

But the media and the political establishment are certain to go all out tonight to blackout and silence my message.

Fellow Conservative, I'm counting on your help to fight back.

**[Will you stand with me and chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help break through the media blackout and take my liberty message directly to the American people](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31290706:WrQeIRmNG:m:1:879035888:A7F9F7AC718F6A34907147BA94FEBC4B:r)**?

Rand

**Subject** : They don't want you to read this
**From** : randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
**To** : Fellow Conservative

Fellow Conservative,

"SHUT UP."

That's the message the recent "debt deal" struck by President Obama and outgoing House Speaker John Boehner is designed to send anyone who's alarmed about our nation's $18.4 TRILLION in debt.

Unless you and I can stop this insanity, this "deal" is effectively nothing more than handing big spenders in Congress a blank check to do their worst until we ring in 2017!

Is this the "fiscal conservatism" the American people voted for at the ballot box in 2014? The new ability for members of BOTH parties to keep spending like no tomorrow?

Fellow Conservative, of course not!

With your help, this is the madness I'm going to rip to shreds during tomorrow night's Republican Debate in Boulder, Colorado.

But I'm counting on your help to bust through the media blackout. **[Will you please agree to your most generous gift of $20.16 or more right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31290706:WrQeIRmNG:m:1:879035888:A7F9F7AC718F6A34907147BA94FEBC4B:r)**?

Sadly, Fellow Conservative, Republicans betraying their supporters is nothing new. It's a big reason our country is in the mess it's in. It's a big reason for the public outrage we've seen playing out in the polls.

And that anger is 100% deserved.

Our country is in too big of a mess to allow the status quo to continue any longer.

Our party can't afford a "whoops" moment where we nominate a candidate who will either lose at the ballot box or continue politics as usual if elected.

Either of those scenarios would be a complete and total failure for our nation and future generations who are counting on us to protect the freedom and prosperity that should be their birthright as American citizens.

That's why I'm counting on your support to help me bust through the media blackout.

Both the media and the political establishment know I'm the Washington Machine's worst nightmare.

While my opponents love to preen for TV and stroke their own ego, I couldn't care less.

This isn't a TV reality show. It's not a contest to see who has the most Wall Street fat-cats, or party bigwigs backing their campaigns.

Our country needs results. It needs leaders who are willing to fight.

Not the constant stream of failures we're so used to. Not liberal appeasement.

Not the "deals" where BOTH parties in Congress agree to look the other way while their colleagues dole out our taxpayer dollars to their partisan cronies.

Our country needs tried and true limited government reforms designed to restore our constitutional freedoms.

Whether it's spending, spying or President Obama's misguided march to war in Syria, I've proven I'll stand to up members of EITHER party.

My plans to institute a 14.5% flat tax, Audit the Fed, end government spying, repeal ObamaCare, impose term limits on Congress, force Congress to read the bills, and balance the budget would revolutionize Washington, D.C.

But I can't do it alone. I'm counting on you to launch the revolution.

**[Will you please agree to your generous gift of $20.16 ahead of tomorrow night's debate](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31290706:WrQeIRmNG:m:1:879035888:A7F9F7AC718F6A34907147BA94FEBC4B:r)**?

Your support can help me bust through the media blackout and bring my message straight to the American people.

Without your dedication, I wouldn't be on that stage tonight, defending American workers and their families. I wouldn't be able to fight for Main Street instead of Wall Street. And I wouldn't be able to travel throughout Iowa like I did in 2012 on my way to victory.

But the fight is far from over, and I can still use your help.

-Rick

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: With sacrifice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Dear Brothers and Sisters,
You already know that I don't go around asking millionaires and billionaires for money, and I don't have a super PAC. This campaign is funded by individual contributions that largely come in response to emails like this one.
Increasingly, people have been making monthly contributions to sustain our political revolution for the long haul. People like Olga in New York who wrote to me saying:
_" My contribution is very small but I know if we all pull together to make a monthly contribution (no matter how small) then we can truly make a difference. The other candidates have a few people with lots of money, but Bernie has lots of people, and that's what's needed to win this election."_
Olga's monthly contribution is important because while we have made great gains in states like Iowa and New Hampshire, we will also have to win many of the states that come after the first four. **And in just four months there are a series of 11 primaries and caucuses known as Super Tuesday that could be a make-or-break day for our political revolution.**
**[Make a $3 recurring contribution for four months to ensure we have the resources we need to win on Super Tuesday.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb245f/43f17890/52a0852a/621f2445/1477202572/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our_campaign?refcode=em151028full&recurring=yes")**
Right now, almost 100,000 individuals have signed up to make a recurring contribution every month to our campaign. I am very proud of that fact.
So join Melanie from Ohio who told me, _" I make this monthly contribution with sacrifice, because although I work hard everyday, my two children don't have a chance without the change Bernie represents!"_
And Mary Francis from New Hampshire who added, _" I am a minister, Hospice Chaplain, University adjunct faculty and single mother of three. Bernie stands for all of the morals and values of caring for one another as citizens of this country and brothers and sisters in the human family. I am happy to support his campaign with my small monthly contribution and will do what I can in giving my time and energy to his platform for a return to a democratic government of the people, for the people, by the people."_
[**Join Olga, Melanie, and Mary Francis with your $3 recurring contribution for four months and we 'll have the resources we need to win on Super Tuesday.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb245f/43f17890/52a0852a/621f2445/1477202572/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our_campaign?refcode=em151028full&recurring=yes")
From day one, the strength of our campaign has been the collective power of people coming together and saying we've had enough with the billionaire class buying our democracy: people attending organizing meetings, making phone calls, leafleting in their communities, contributing to our campaign, and more.
What we're proving here, to everyone watching, is that **if we stand together, we will win.**
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb245f/43f17890/52a0852a/621f2445/1477202572/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our_campaign?refcode=em151028full&recurring=yes")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb245f/43f17890/52a0852a/621f2442/1477202572/VEsO/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb245f/43f17890/52a0852a/621f2443/1477202572/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb245f/43f17890/52a0852a/621f2440/1477202572/VEsHBQ/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb245f/43f17890/52a0852a/621f2441/1477202572/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Eric Greitens
subject: A quick note
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREITENS FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,
I wanted to send you a quick note about where things
stand on the campaign. It has been a fast, productive, energizing
month since we launched this new mission.
I got into this race because Missouri needs a Governor
who will fight the career politicians and do what is hard and
right to get us moving forward.
Look, I'm not a politician. I've never run for
political office. But I'm approaching this election the same way
I have approached every battle in my life. Every day, our team
does three things: 1) we work hard, 2) we achieve excellence, and
3) we have fun!
Our momentum has been outstanding! We've got the
political insiders running scared, and I need your help to build
on our momentum.
Will you consider chipping in $7 today?
Your investment helps us to spread our message.
Now, let's do this!
Best,
Eric
Sent from my iPhone
PAID FOR BY GREITENS FOR MISSOURI
JEFF STUERMAN, TREASURER

name: Mike Mikus
subject: Pat Toomey will be smiling tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend,

The third GOP Presidential debate is tonight, and Republican Pat Toomey is really looking forward to it. Why? Because Donald Trump, Ben Carson, Carly Fiorina, and all of the other GOP candidates are going to be pitching extreme, right-wing views that Pat Toomey agrees with. And they'll be doing it to a national audience of millions of Americans.

Republican Pat Toomey might not be on the stage tonight, but his priorities sure will be -- priorities like shutting down the government to defund Planned Parenthood, privatizing Social Security and making it harder for families to get ahead.

**Friend, we can 't afford to send Republican Pat Toomey back to the Senate where he could end up working hand-in-hand with a right-wing House of Representatives, and maybe even a President like Donald Trump or Ben Carson. **

[**That 's why we need Katie McGinty in Washington, working for us. Donate $5 now to help elect Katie to the U.S. Senate where she'll stand up and fight to make sure that middle class families can get ahead.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7141114820228546560/4779184520291155968?refcode=e20151028nd&amount=5)

Tonight, when Ben Carson says he wants to ban all abortions under any circumstances, remember that Pat Toomey voted to shut down the federal government because he didn't want to fund health care for women. When Carly Fiorina talks about eliminating the federal minimum wage, remember that Pat Toomey stubbornly refused to give Americans the raise they so desperately need to make ends meet.

**Katie will be a champion for the middle class, for women, for workers, and for everyone 's chance to pursue the American dream. But she needs your help.**

[**Before tonight 's debate, donate $5 to help send Katie to the U.S. Senate and show these Presidential candidates that you support Katie's vision for America, not theirs.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7141114820228546560/4779184520291155968?refcode=e20151028nd&amount=5)

The extreme ideas we're going to hear tonight aren't just ideas. **They 're plans.** And they could become the future of our country if we send Republican Pat Toomey back to the Senate.

Friend, we're counting on you not to let that happen.

Thanks for your support,

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager

subject: Why Bobby ran for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jindal For President
body:
|
---
| | Tonight, Bobby will participate in the CNBC Presidential debate about the economy at 6PM Eastern. It got me thinking about why Bobby ran for Governor of Louisiana eight years ago: For 25 straight years, people were leaving Louisiana to seek economic opportunity elsewhere. Louisiana was in trouble. Like many families in Louisiana, Bobby and I wondered if our kids had a future here. That’s why Bobby ran for Governor.

Bobby asked Louisianians to believe in Louisiana again. He rolled up his sleeves, and he passed bold reforms.

**Today, there are more people living in Louisiana than at anytime in our state’s history. And equally important, wages are higher than they have ever been.**

Bobby’s reforms worked. They weren’t always popular - disrupting the status quo never is - but they worked. Education, the economy, ethics, you name it, Louisiana is better off today.

After 7 years of President Obama, our nation is at a critical crossroads. If you are looking for a new President to make small changes here and there, Bobby isn’t your guy. That’s just not the type of leader he is. [But if you are looking for a President who will make bold changes using conservative principles, I’m asking you to believe in Bobby and chip in with a $100, $50 or even $10 contribution right now.](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=2ba9873625&e=724c64cfa7)

Bobby’s bold conservative reforms worked in Louisiana, they will work in Washington too.

Thank you,
Supriya

subject: great debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend --

What a debate! I am about to board my plane to Iowa and I wanted to tell you how excited I am about our performance.

This was a pivotal point in our campaign, where we brought our vision of fighting for you -- hardworking American families -- to the forefront.

And I made my opponents answer to it.

My [Economic Freedom Agenda](http://www.ricksantorum.com/tax_plan?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate_d&n=1) is the only plan that shreds the tax code, stops Obama's job-killing regulations in their tracks, and halts the constant flow of illegal immigration that kills American jobs.

Our mission is to protect and enhance the opportunities for American workers and the economy they build. Now we need to make sure that the Washington Establishment gets the message that the American people are behind the only plan that actually fights for them.

That's why I'm asking for your help to spread this message not only in Iowa, but all across America. You've voiced your support for our vision throughout my campaign -- [can you back up that support by making a donation so we can continue the fight?](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/contribute?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate_d&n=2)

I'm still on the ground, working every day to bring a voice to the concerns of everyday Americans and, with your help, we can take to the air as well.

I've been blessed with the support you've given me since the start and for that, I thank you!

-Rick

---

We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate_d&n=4) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate_d&n=5), [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate_d&n=6), or [Instagram](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate_d&n=7).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147
